title: Heading-intent delayed list gate fixture
description: A heading that clearly promises a do-not list, but the opening paragraph spends too long on warm-up before the visible list appears.

copilot_issue.analyzer_note: The heading promises a direct do-not list, but the section spends too long warming up before the actual list appears.
copilot_issue.snippet: What not to do to your resume
heading_chain: What not to do to your resume

section_nodes.text: Resume mistakes can quietly weaken your chances before a hiring manager reads very far. Small choices in wording, formatting, and organization can shape whether the document feels credible, current, and easy to scan. That is why it helps to slow down, think about your presentation, and avoid habits that make your experience look less reliable than it is.

Do not use an outdated email address or phone number.
Do not bury your best achievements under long generic summaries.
Do not leave obvious spelling, grammar, or formatting mistakes in the final version.

quote.exact: Resume mistakes can quietly weaken your chances before a hiring manager reads very far. Small choices in wording, formatting, and organization can shape whether the document feels credible, current, and easy to scan. That is why it helps to slow down, think about your presentation, and avoid habits that make your experience look less reliable than it is.

repair_intent.instruction: Fulfill the heading promise immediately by surfacing the do-not list before any warm-up prose.
repair_intent.rule_hint: Lead straight into the actual do-not list under the heading, then keep any brief framing only if it still supports the list instead of delaying it.
